scenes.voiceText: Jack Harris (V.O.): I'm never going to make it... I'll never find my voice...,The Studio: *whispers* Ah, but you already have.
scenes.visualPrompt: A close-up shot of a coffee-stained script on the desk, with a faint glow emanating from it
scenes.motionPrompt: Slow zoom in on the script, with a slight camera shake
scenes.shotNotes: Animate The Studio Awakens with Slow zoom in on the script, with a slight camera shake. Use visual prompt as frame guidance and keep continuity with [object Object].
scenes.cameraPlan: Start wide, move to medium performance coverage, end on a detail or reaction for The Studio Awakens.
shots: Shot A: Establish The Studio Awakens with A close-up shot of a coffee-stained script on the desk, with a faint glow emanating from it.
Shot B: Push motion with Slow zoom in on the script, with a slight camera shake.
Shot C: Land on the strongest acting beat tied to creaking wood.

scenes.voiceText: Jack Harris: What am I doing wrong?!,The Studio: *laughs* Oh, you're just not listening.
scenes.visualPrompt: A wide shot of Jack pacing around the studio, looking frazzled and worried
scenes.motionPrompt: Slow tracking shot following Jack as he paces
scenes.shotNotes: Animate Jack's Dilemma with Slow tracking shot following Jack as he paces. Use visual prompt as frame guidance and keep continuity with [object Object].
scenes.cameraPlan: Start wide, move to medium performance coverage, end on a detail or reaction for Jack's Dilemma.
shots: Shot A: Establish Jack's Dilemma with A wide shot of Jack pacing around the studio, looking frazzled and worried.
Shot B: Push motion with Slow tracking shot following Jack as he paces.
Shot C: Land on the strongest acting beat tied to footsteps on wood floor.

scenes.voiceText: Jack Harris: You're just a room! You don't have thoughts or feelings!,The Studio: *smirking* Oh, but I do. And they're all very... script-y.
scenes.visualPrompt: A split-screen shot of Jack and the studio's responses, with a timer counting down in the middle
scenes.motionPrompt: Fast-paced cuts between Jack and the studio's different attempts at communication
scenes.shotNotes: Animate The Battle Begins with Fast-paced cuts between Jack and the studio's different attempts at communication. Use visual prompt as frame guidance and keep continuity with [object Object].
scenes.cameraPlan: Start wide, move to medium performance coverage, end on a detail or reaction for The Battle Begins.
shots: Shot A: Establish The Battle Begins with A split-screen shot of Jack and the studio's responses, with a timer counting down in the middle.
Shot B: Push motion with Fast-paced cuts between Jack and the studio's different attempts at communication.
Shot C: Land on the strongest acting beat tied to typing sounds.

windowsScript.content:
@echo off
setlocal
mkdir "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma" 2>nul
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "Jack Harris (V.O.): I'm never going to make it... I'll never find my voice...,The Studio: *whispers* Ah, but you already have." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/scene_01_the-studio-awakens_voice.wav" --scene "01"
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "Jack Harris: What am I doing wrong?!,The Studio: *laughs* Oh, you're just not listening." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/scene_02_jack-s-dilemma_voice.wav" --scene "02"
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "Jack Harris: You're just a room! You don't have thoughts or feelings!,The Studio: *smirking* Oh, but I do. And they're all very... script-y." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/scene_03_the-battle-begins_voice.wav" --scene "03"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "01" --visual "A close-up shot of a coffee-stained script on the desk, with a faint glow emanating from it" --motion "Slow zoom in on the script, with a slight camera shake" --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/scene_01_the-studio-awakens_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/scene_01_the-studio-awakens.mp4"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "02" --visual "A wide shot of Jack pacing around the studio, looking frazzled and worried" --motion "Slow tracking shot following Jack as he paces" --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/scene_02_jack-s-dilemma_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/scene_02_jack-s-dilemma.mp4"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "03" --visual "A split-screen shot of Jack and the studio's responses, with a timer counting down in the middle" --motion "Fast-paced cuts between Jack and the studio's different attempts at communication" --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/scene_03_the-battle-begins_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/scene_03_the-battle-begins.mp4"
python build_concat_manifest.py --job "028aaa5bc5cff19d7bd8cca6" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/episode_concat.txt"
ffmpeg -y -f concat -safe 0 -i "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/episode_concat.txt" -c:v libx264 -pix_fmt yuv420p -c:a aac -b:a 192k "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/the-host-s-dilemma_final_episode.mp4"
echo Episode build complete.
endlocal

bashScript.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma"
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "Jack Harris (V.O.): I'm never going to make it... I'll never find my voice...,The Studio: *whispers* Ah, but you already have." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/scene_01_the-studio-awakens_voice.wav" --scene "01"
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "Jack Harris: What am I doing wrong?!,The Studio: *laughs* Oh, you're just not listening." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/scene_02_jack-s-dilemma_voice.wav" --scene "02"
python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "Jack Harris: You're just a room! You don't have thoughts or feelings!,The Studio: *smirking* Oh, but I do. And they're all very... script-y." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/scene_03_the-battle-begins_voice.wav" --scene "03"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "01" --visual "A close-up shot of a coffee-stained script on the desk, with a faint glow emanating from it" --motion "Slow zoom in on the script, with a slight camera shake" --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/scene_01_the-studio-awakens_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/scene_01_the-studio-awakens.mp4"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "02" --visual "A wide shot of Jack pacing around the studio, looking frazzled and worried" --motion "Slow tracking shot following Jack as he paces" --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/scene_02_jack-s-dilemma_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/scene_02_jack-s-dilemma.mp4"
python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "03" --visual "A split-screen shot of Jack and the studio's responses, with a timer counting down in the middle" --motion "Fast-paced cuts between Jack and the studio's different attempts at communication" --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/scene_03_the-battle-begins_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/scene_03_the-battle-begins.mp4"
python build_concat_manifest.py --job "028aaa5bc5cff19d7bd8cca6" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/episode_concat.txt"
ffmpeg -y -f concat -safe 0 -i "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/episode_concat.txt" -c:v libx264 -pix_fmt yuv420p -c:a aac -b:a 192k "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/the-host-s-dilemma_final_episode.mp4"
echo 'Episode build complete.'

voiceCommands: python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "Jack Harris (V.O.): I'm never going to make it... I'll never find my voice...,The Studio: *whispers* Ah, but you already have." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/scene_01_the-studio-awakens_voice.wav" --scene "01"

python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "Jack Harris: What am I doing wrong?!,The Studio: *laughs* Oh, you're just not listening." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/scene_02_jack-s-dilemma_voice.wav" --scene "02"

python local_tts.py --model "llama3.1:8b" --text "Jack Harris: You're just a room! You don't have thoughts or feelings!,The Studio: *smirking* Oh, but I do. And they're all very... script-y." --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/scene_03_the-battle-begins_voice.wav" --scene "03"
renderCommands: python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "01" --visual "A close-up shot of a coffee-stained script on the desk, with a faint glow emanating from it" --motion "Slow zoom in on the script, with a slight camera shake" --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/scene_01_the-studio-awakens_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/scene_01_the-studio-awakens.mp4"

python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "02" --visual "A wide shot of Jack pacing around the studio, looking frazzled and worried" --motion "Slow tracking shot following Jack as he paces" --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/scene_02_jack-s-dilemma_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/scene_02_jack-s-dilemma.mp4"

python local_scene_renderer.py --profile "1080p-series-balanced" --scene "03" --visual "A split-screen shot of Jack and the studio's responses, with a timer counting down in the middle" --motion "Fast-paced cuts between Jack and the studio's different attempts at communication" --voice "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/scene_03_the-battle-begins_voice.wav" --out "render_lab/animation_jobs/the-host-s-dilemma/scene_03_the-battle-begins.mp4"
executionNotes: Run voice generation first so every scene gets a concrete WAV asset.
Run the renderer second so each scene produces its own MP4 file in the job output directory.
Run the ffmpeg concat build last to assemble the final episode from the rendered scene clips.
